content: hi rat <@693905974750216212> <:rizz2:1356053138133614753> I finally got +12 titan for my jenkins account <:proud1:1356053120651755641> do you know if kath's wheel or daff's wheel would be better for the 2nd slot? I got +3 kath for her but then I got daff's wheel after <:dead:1356082627509092372> I can +3 it too, but I was wondering if the difference is that big between the too
I was thinking kath's wheel shines during burst ultra turns, but daff's wheel sounds like the effect is more permanent
I saw someone use +12 dmg amp instead <:thinking1:1356068128936820929>  how do ppl even test in-game without going into an exploration stage <:dead:1356082627509092372>
Daff wheel is better for rat consistency tbh, since while kath’s dmg amp is nice, if you have +3 daff it’s better since you get +5% final dmg everytime you leap rat card
Also rat can’t make use of the str gen buff on kath wheel so that’s a bit better for your str bot (whoever it is)
Kath wheel is nicer for shorter stages though/with less mobs i think though
I’ll have to test them more thoroughly later, but that’s just my surface thoughts from what i’ve done so far
yea I figured...I think kath wheel might be useful for boss only stages idk... I'm reluctant to bench it because I did spend my l.cores on it <:Emoji_24_P_11:1400771541423226971>
thank you for your response though! <:rizz2:1356053138133614753>  I've been enjoying rat gaming a lot, it's so fun

Nah that makes sense <:thumbsup:1356086340298473574> 
Do keep in mind it gives temp str the more cards you spam that turn, so if you go into rat exalt then multiple nukes on ultra turn, you should be able to get decent mileage out of the temp str gen
